\tzpentry{ID3568}{Quantum State Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3568 introduces Quantum State Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \boxed{\Psi(\theta,\lambda,t)=\Psi_{\rm dipole}(\theta,\lambda)+\Psi_{\rm axial}(\theta,\lambda)+\sum_{l,m}A_{l,m}Y_{l}^{m}(\theta,\lambda)\,e^{i\omega_{l,m} t} } \]
